description_long: This food truck features a vintage, open-sided design with a long rectangular body and a canopy roof supported by slender posts. The exterior is primarily dark with maroon accents, including the roof, fenders, and round stools attached along the serving side. The front of the truck has a classic, early-20th-century automobile appearance, complete with large spoked wheels, a visible steering wheel, and a step for entry. The serving area is equipped with a row of stools for customers and a counter for food preparation and service, with what appear to be taps or dispensers mounted on the counter. The rear of the truck is enclosed, while the sides are open to facilitate customer interaction. The overall structure suggests a robust metal and wood construction, suitable for urban street vending.
description: A vintage-style food truck with a maroon canopy, open serving side with stools, and classic spoked wheels. The truck features a long counter for service and a retro automotive front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the classic vehicle grille, large spoked wheels, and the step for driver entry.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the open serving area with stools, long counter, and maroon canopy roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the enclosed back of the truck and the arrangement of stools along the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the serving counter, stools, and vehicle cab.
